FIN.name: Finance & Markets
FIN.description: Financial markets, instruments, trading, and market mechanics

ENR.name: Energy & Power
ENR.description: Energy production, oil, gas, renewables, and power markets

COM.name: Commodities & Agriculture
COM.description: Commodity markets, precious metals, industrial metals, and agricultural products

MAC.name: Macroeconomics & Indicators
MAC.description: GDP, inflation, employment, monetary and fiscal policy

GEO.name: Geopolitics & Trade Policy
GEO.description: Trade policy, sanctions, tariffs, and geopolitical risk factors

REG.name: Regulation & Compliance
REG.description: Financial regulation, compliance requirements, and regulatory frameworks

rules.name: Require Source URL
rules.description: Every fragment must have a source_url

rules.name: Require Year
rules.description: Every fragment must have a year

rules.name: No Stale Fragments
rules.description: Fragments older than 2 years cannot exceed credibility score of 60

rules.name: No Price Predictions
rules.description: Any fragment containing price targets must include uncertainty note

rules.name: Minimum Credibility
rules.description: Fragments must have recognized credibility class
